name: @shipapp/metadata
description: Manage App Store Connect metadata from the command line — upload descriptions, keywords, screenshots, and more.

scripts.build: esbuild src/cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --outfile=dist/cli.js --format=cjs --banner:js='#!/usr/bin/env node' && esbuild src/mcp/server.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --outfile=dist/mcp.js --format=cjs --banner:js='#!/usr/bin/env node'
